question: The Hawthorne effect suggests
options: Meeting basic needs before higher-level motivators like achievement
Workers perform better when they know they are being observed
Identifying and developing employees to fill future leadership roles
Employees are lazy and must be closely controlled
answer: Workers perform better when they know they are being observed

options: Meeting basic needs before higher-level motivators like achievement

Defines the expected standard of service between provider and client
answer: Meeting basic needs before higher-level motivators like achievement
